meta.title: Connecting Our Military Community, Now & Always
meta.description:
May 1st marks the start of Military Appreciation Month 🇺🇸

The last few weeks have brought about change and uncertainty, something the military community is all too familiar with. As a team, we are committed to our mission & honored to serve our military community. That's why we are working hard to ensure that our community can continue to stay connected during this time.

Stay safe, happy letter writing.💌
